relationship_to_primary_preregistration: Exploratory extension. The original category-only filters were too narrow to meet the retained-sample gate. These rules exclude only one materially weak regime and pass unavailable warm-up observations through unchanged.

rules.rationale: The countertrend category was negative in aggregate; retain aligned and neutral states.
The H4 countertrend category was negative; retain aligned and neutral states.
Both-countertrend was negative and both-aligned was near zero; retain only mixed or neutral confluence.
The middle volatility tercile was negative while low and high terciles were positive.
Compressed initial ranges were materially negative; retain normal and expanded ranges.
Contrary to the initial hypothesis, near-prior-day directional extremes were materially negative.

unavailable_handling: Pass through unavailable warm-up observations; do not convert feature warm-up into a historical filter.

hard_requirements: Expectancy improves by at least 0.03R, or drawdown falls by at least 20% without lower expectancy.
Positive in all three calendar years, or two positive with the third no worse than -5R.
No session or half-year contributes more than 60% of net R.

interpretation_lock: A pass authorizes only HOLD_FOR_FRESH_OOS. It does not validate the timing-selected baseline or authorize deployment.
